fields.Name: IT02 - RunQuery Cache Integrity
fields.Description: Ports runquery-cache-tests.ts Q1-Q9 (TTL + smart-validation query cache modes). The whole bundle mutates the DB by design: it creates/tears down a Query Category + two Queries via a driver-level try/finally inside the bundle, and creates/deletes MJ: User Settings rows the fixture queries count.

ExpectedOutcomes.summary: current/stale/no_validation statuses correct; MaxRows/Parameters fingerprint separately; failed executions never cached; fixtures cleaned up.
